title: Pisek's Storage Tower
description: Simple and bit cursed storage mod.
body:
# Pisek's Storage Tower

Simple and bit cursed storage mod.

## Features:

### Storage and Crafting Controller

- Used to view stored items

### Storage Crate

- Main storage block
- Can hold up to 2304 items. That's 36 slots of storage!

### Storage Interface

- Allows storing and extracting items using hoppers and pipes

### Storage Upgrade

- Used as a crafting ingredient only.
